title: AXI: Agent eXperience Interface
author: Kun Chen (@kunchenguid)
content_summary: Homepage of the AXI (Agent eXperience Interface) framework by Kun Chen. AXI is a set of 10 design principles for building CLI tools optimized for AI agents. The premise: protocol choice (CLI vs MCP) matters less than principled design. Benchmarks show AXI tools outperform MCP equivalents on cost (33-66% cheaper), success rate, and turn count.
key_points: AXI = 10 principles grouped in 4 categories: Efficiency, Robustness, Discoverability, plus help access
TOON format claims ~40% token savings over JSON
Distinguished from agentexperience.ax (Netlify-led broader AX movement)
